summary: Added 'isocyanide' SMARTS feature [C-]#[N+] (distinguishes Ugi/Passerini MCRs from Aldol/Mannich). Added 4 subfamily guards: Aldol anti-greed (penalize isocyanide or boron+amine → Ugi/Passerini/Petasis); Ugi Multicomponent 4-component (amine|ammonia support); Passerini 3-component; Petasis Boronic Acid-Mannich (narrowed via 'boronic' OR 'mannich' to exclude Petasis-Ferrier/Petasis-Tebbe).

change_lines.aldol_anti_greed: line ~1482-1490 — elif fam == 'aldol reaction' or startswith('aldol reaction') — penalize isocyanide 0.50, boron+amine 0.60
change_lines.ugi_mcr_guard: line ~1491-1504 — 4 penalties (missing iso/carb/amine|ammonia/cooh) + 1.25 boost for 4-component combo
change_lines.petasis_mannich_guard: line ~1516-1527 — narrow match 'petasis' AND ('mannich' OR 'boronic'); 3 penalties (boron/amine|ammonia/carbonyl) + 1.20 boost

strict_non_regression_status: PASS — all 9 metrics >= 3g-2c baseline; 2 improved, 7 unchanged, 0 regressed
diagnostic_journey: Probed target DB rows: Aldol Reaction (12), Ugi Multicomponent (4), Passerini (4), Petasis Boronic Acid-Mannich (4) — plus co-named Petasis-Ferrier (4), Petasis-Tebbe Olefination (4) which share 'petasis' substring.
Initial naive 'petasis' in fam guard catastrophically penalized Petasis-Ferrier (mult=0.05) and Petasis-Tebbe (mult=0.09).
Narrowed petasis guard: 'petasis' AND ('mannich' OR 'boronic'). Confirmed Petasis-Ferrier/Petasis-Tebbe DB rows now mult=1.0.
Ugi_1347 uses 'N' (NH3) for amine source; amine SMARTS [NX3;H2,H1] excludes H3. Added amine|ammonia fallback matching 3g-2c pattern. id=1347 now boosts correctly.
Smoke test (15 checks) all PASS including Petasis-Ferrier/Petasis-Tebbe no-op, Ugi NH3 boost, Aldol anti-greed firing on Passerini/Petasis SMILES.
Per-case diff: 2 coverage gains (Petasis_1142 r@1, Ugi_1345 r@5), admission unchanged because Aldol→Benzoin/Stetter greed shift preserved top3 but not top1.

roi_analysis.next_step: Potentially continue with 3g-4 Benzoin/Stetter anti-greed (direct followup: Benzoin/Retro-Benzoin took top1 on Petasis_1141 and Ugi_1345/1346; Stetter took top1 on Passerini_1126/1127). Otherwise transition to Phase 3f hand-curated DB seeds.

smoke_tests: smoke_3g_3.py — 15 PASS / 0 FAIL covering Aldol anti-greed, Ugi/Passerini/Petasis boosts, Petasis-Ferrier/Petasis-Tebbe no-op guard, isocyanide feature extraction
probe_3g_3_rows.py — all DB rows of Aldol/Evans-Aldol/Mukaiyama-Aldol/Ugi/Passerini/Petasis-Mannich/Petasis-Ferrier/Petasis-Tebbe verified clean (own-family mult=1.0 or boost)
